x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Customer / Participant / Account Holder: The person or entity that earns the cashback.

Comment:
Example: Customer, employee, partner.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sponsor / Funder
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Sponsor / Funder: The party that finances or provides the cashback reward.

Comment:
Example: Bank, company, merchant.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Merchant
x-enumeration-literals.description: Merchant: The business where the qualifying transaction occurs (in retail cashback programs).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Administrator / Program Manager
x-enumeration-literals.description: Administrator / Program Manager: The entity responsible for managing, calculating, and processing cashback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Processor / Settlement Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: Processor / Settlement Agent: The party that handles payment processing or transfers.
